prose: Frontier orbitals for aniline were computed using density functional theory (DFT) at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier 'standard') in the gas phase, as implemented in PySCF. The electronic self-consistent field (SCF) procedure converged successfully over 9 cycles. The highest occupied molecular orbital (HOMO) energy is -5.553772 eV, and the lowest unoccupied molecular orbital (LUMO) energy is -0.2489544 eV, resulting in a HOMO–LUMO gap of 5.3048177 eV.
